creator: rleigh@codelibre.net
text:
Created attachment 162640
Files for new port

The Apache Xalan-C++ XSLT processor, based on Xerces-C++.  This port uses the same naming convention as the existing xalan-j and xerces-c ports.

I have configured it similarly to the existing Debian package of the same name, with "inmem" localisation (ICU support seems broken).  I have also picked up a one-line patch from the Debian package which prevents a segfault under some conditions.


Regards,
Roger
